description: A suspicious conversation has been identified in the 'IT Support' mailbox that appears to be a phishing attempt. Log in to FreeScout at http://localhost:8080 (admin@helpdesk.local / Admin123!) and mark the conversation with the subject "URGENT: Your IT credentials expire today - immediate action required" as Spam to remove it from the active ticket queue.

metadata.target_subject: URGENT: Your IT credentials expire today - immediate action required
